title: 查询等价性证明框架
target: Query equivalence framework — optimizer transformations preserve SQL semantics
description: 查询等价性证明框架：优化器转换保持 SQL 语义。

evidence.verification_method: Property-based test via cargo test -p sqlrustgo-optimizer
evidence.framework_note: PROOF-014 is a framework, not a single proof. Equivalence verified through test suite.

known_issues.formulog_syntax_errors: docs/proof/PROOF-014-query-equivalence.formalog contains syntax errors: markdown headers (##), invalid identifier 'enable.', unsupported '&&' and 'eval()' syntax. Cannot be executed directly with formulog 0.8.0.jar.
known_issues.actual_verification: Query equivalence is verified via property-based tests in cargo test -p sqlrustgo-optimizer, not via the .formalog file directly.

author: openclaw
